summary: Completed testing of Dashboard Bug Fix and Mobile Responsiveness. All priority features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats API correctly returns implemented_ideas and assigned_to_te_ideas fields
DashboardStats Pydantic model properly includes all required fields
Mobile responsive styling applied correctly with sm/md/lg breakpoints
Stat cards are clickable and link to filtered ideas list
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data - 11 ideas with various statuses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard bug fix verified - implemented_ideas shows 1, assigned_to_te_ideas shows 2. Mobile responsiveness tested on Dashboard, IdeasList, IdeaDetail, and AdminPanel pages at 375px viewport. All features working correctly.

mobile_responsiveness.dashboard: PASSED - All 8 stat cards visible, Best Eye-dea banner displays correctly
mobile_responsiveness.ideas_list: PASSED - Filter section visible and functional, Create button visible
mobile_responsiveness.idea_detail: PASSED - Back button visible, Status badge visible, Layout adapts well
mobile_responsiveness.admin_panel: PASSED - All 5 tabs accessible and clickable on mobile

features_tested.stat_card_links: PASSED - Clicking Implemented card navigates to /ideas?status=implemented
features_tested.filter_functionality: PASSED - Status filter dropdown works on mobile

mocked_apis.email_service: MOCKED - Resend email service configured but in test mode
